name: agentcert
description: AgentCert: pre-release benchmarks, browser-agent tripwires, and production runtime assurance for agent tools.

scripts.mcpbench:check: ruff format --check . && ruff check . && mypy src/mcpbench && pytest
scripts.tripwire:lab-browser-use: npm run tripwire:build && node packages/tripwire-ci/dist/cli.js run -c examples/real-agents/browser-use/tripwire.browser-use.yml --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/browser-use --fail-under 0 && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.agentcert:init: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-cli run build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js init
scripts.agentcert:report: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-cli run build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js report --mcpbench examples/reports/passing/results.json --out .agentcert/latest --subject demo-agent
scripts.agentcert:run-public: npm run agentcert:build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js run --profile public-demo
scripts.agentcert:lab-build: npm run agentcert:build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js lab build --config examples/real-agents/robustness-lab/lab.config.json --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/lab-snapshot.json
scripts.agentcert:public-build: npm run agentcert:monitor-build && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.agentcert:monitor-build: npm run agentcert:run-public && npm run dashboard:build
scripts.agentcert:serve: npm run agentcert:monitor-build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js serve --corpus public-demo/browser-agent-robustness/evidence/agentcert-corpus.jsonl --artifact-root public-demo/browser-agent-robustness/evidence/tripwire-public-demo --static public-demo/agentcert-monitor --subject agentcert-public-demo
scripts.check: npm run tripwire:build && npm run tripwire:test && npm run onegent:build && npm run onegent:test && npm run agentcert:build && npm run agentcert:test
